word: H8407 - תִּגְלַת פִּלְאֶסֶר - Tiglath Pilʼeçer - tig-lath' pil-eh'-ser - Tiglath-pileser

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּלגּת פּלנאסר תּגלת פּלאסר

Transliteration: tiglath pil'eser tilgath pilne'eser

Phonetic: tig-lath' pil-eh'-ser

BDB Definition:

Tiglath-pileser or Tilgath-pilneser = "thou will uncover the wonderful bond"
  1. an Assyrian king who attacked Samaria or northern kingdom of Israel in the reign of Pekah

Origin: of foreign derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
